description:
Parent epic: V3 E5: Controls and human in the loop

Source task 4/9 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Finalize control return types for allow, transform, block, interrupt, and
  error.

Epic closure criteria:
- Controls are the one public policy concept
- human-in-the-loop is demonstrated without new runtime machinery
- raising controls cannot crash the agent process

comments.text: Finalized control return types: explicit :allow, transform support for input/result controls, operation transform rejection, and docs/tests for the public contract.

title: E5: Finalize control return types for allow, transform, block, interrupt, and error
